ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the equipment */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the equipment */,
  "hashrate" REAL /* Hash rate of the equipment in Th/s */,
  "power_consumption" INTEGER /* Power consumption of the equipment in Watts */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Algorithm used by the equipment (e.g., X11, SHA-256) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment type */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, under maintenance, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES equipment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* JSON object storing environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of equipment the facility can handle */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_facilities" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the equipment is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed at the facility */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was decommissioned from the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id", "facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object storing typical performance metrics for the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "difficulty_factor" REAL /* Difficulty factor of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profitability" (
  "profitability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profitability entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the profitability data */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit of the equipment in USD */,
  "cost_of_electricity" REAL /* Cost of electricity used by the equipment */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit after deducting the cost of electricity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profitability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profitability_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the efficiency data */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the equipment in j/Gh */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at which the efficiency was measured */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity at which the efficiency was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficiency_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "next_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, technician) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
